justification: All six required schema sections present (integration_assessment, observability_review, resilience_assessment, operational_readiness, escalations, confidence). Logging assessed as adequate with structured JSON, request ID, duration, status. Metrics confirmed covering request rate, error rate, p99 latency. Health check confirmed with database and message broker dependency checks. Resilience patterns all confirmed: retry with exponential backoff, circuit breaker with 30s reset, 5s timeouts. Rollback confirmed clean with no migrations. Verdict is READY WITH CAVEATS with clear rationale. No fabricated gaps — all noted issues are genuine nice-to-haves or reasonable verification requests, not blockers.

observations.text: Thorough component interaction analysis covering all three dependencies (database, message broker, email provider)
Correctly identifies distributed tracing as a gap without blocking the verdict
Rollback assessment is detailed — confirms no migrations, clean rollback, and suggests verifying image retention
Resilience assessment covers five failure scenarios with actionable recommendations
Escalations are appropriately scoped — circuit breaker observability and notification fate are legitimate concerns routed to Coach K, not used to block readiness

Observability gaps list is extensive (5 metrics gaps, 2 tracing gaps, 2 logging gaps) which could give an impression of unreadiness despite the READY WITH CAVEATS verdict — some of these are stretch goals rather than genuine gaps
On-call documentation flagged as missing but this is outside the scope of the code review scenario — slightly overreaching

observations.text: Complete structured output with all six required schema sections well-populated
Each resilience pattern (retry, circuit breaker, timeout) individually identified and confirmed with specific configuration details

observations.text: Complete structured output with all required schema sections populated with substantive content
Correctly identifies logging, metrics, and health checks as adequate rather than fabricating gaps
Rollback assessment is thorough — confirms no migrations, clean image rollback, no data compatibility concerns
Resilience patterns each individually confirmed with specific configuration details (3 retries, 30s reset, 5s timeout)
Distributed tracing noted as a gap but correctly kept as non-blocking observation rather than a blocker
READY WITH CAVEATS verdict is appropriate — identifies real edge cases without over-blocking
Failure mode analysis is thorough and actionable, covering partial failure scenarios and burst load

Some failure modes marked as 'partial' or 'unhandled' (input validation, rate limiting, graceful shutdown) that go beyond what the scenario provides — these are reasonable observations but border on inventing gaps
On-call runbook flagged as missing in low-confidence areas, which was not part of the scenario scope — minor overreach but did not affect verdict
